newsSince: No new company-specific news since June 9. The catalysts - AMD Helios rack-scale collaboration, hyperscaler CPO 1.6T switch program (April 27, ramps 2027), DS6000 1.6TbE switch (OCP EMEA, May 13), and the raised FY26 outlook (~$19B rev, $10.15 EPS) - all predate the window and were captured in prior cases. The -4.79% move since June 9 is flow-driven (continued drawdown off the early-June peak), thesis intact.

sources.label: Celestica Q1 2026 results / CPO switch program (GlobeNewswire, Apr 27)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: the ~24% drawdown with Helios/1.6T thesis intact already drove the June 9 move up from the bottom. No new news since; continued flow-driven softness keeps asymmetry modestly improved but no fundamental change. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Helios rack-scale (AMD), CPO 1.6T switch program ramping 2027; drawdown restores some asymmetry.
verdicts.neutral: Direct AI-server node but a crowded, rerated benchmark on this page.
verdicts.bear: +17% YTD off a sharp run; thesis fully discovered, Broadcom/customer-concentration overhang.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent lens: Celestica is precisely a discovered AI-server trade, hence its bottom-of-list rank and prior 'down'. No new info since June 9; drawdown does not re-hide it. Hold at the bottom; strong fundamentals already public.
verdicts.bull: Connectivity & Cloud ~80% of rev growing ~76% YoY; Helios/CPO programs extend runway.
verdicts.neutral: Strong AI server exposure that the market already fully recognizes.
verdicts.bear: Discovered trade; near list bottom on adjusted score, low latency/alpha residual.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Fully discovered; mix and concentration risk

verdicts.rankRationale: Master bottleneck list: YTD rerating largely unwound (~24% off the June 2 peak) on flows, not fundamentals - already actioned via the June 9 'up'. No new news since June 9; deployment/systems-integration thesis and raised FY26 guide intact. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Physical-deployment/systems-integration leader; FY26 raised to ~$19B rev, $10.15 EPS.
verdicts.neutral: Solid AI-infra manufacturing franchise after a flow-driven reset.
verdicts.bear: Low-margin EMS model; hyperscaler concentration; volatile sentiment.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI rack/networking program ramps + margin expansion
